title: Sourcemeta One Schema Search RPC Input
description: Search for schemas in the catalog by query term

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return
limit.$comment: Accepting a JSON-encoded string form (e.g. "5") is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112

scope.description: Schema fields to match the query against
scope.$comment: Accepting a comma-separated string form (e.g. "title,description") is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112
